description: Mailchimp is a cloud-based email marketing platform that allows users to create, send, and analyze email campaigns, manage audiences, and automate marketing workflows.
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up and use Mailchimp directly via the web interface.
api_surface: Extensive RESTful API covering audiences, campaigns, templates, reports, e-commerce, webhooks, etc. Available in multiple languages via SDKs.
buildability: High – comprehensive SDKs, detailed documentation, sandbox environment, and example code.
main_blocker: Rate limiting (10,000 requests per hour) and requirement to manage API keys/OAuth tokens.
